title: Sales Assistant I Beauty
description:
Job description

Beauty Advisor 

5 Days Work Week

Role Overview

We are looking for a passionate and customer-focused Beauty Advisor to deliver personalised consultation services using advanced diagnostic equipment. This role combines hands-on customer consultation, product recommendation, and retail operations, making it ideal for individuals who are enthusiastic about skincare, haircare, and customer wellness.

You will play a key role in elevating the in-store experience, building customer trust, and driving growth within the skincare and haircare categories.

Key Responsibilities

1. End-to-End Customer Engagement

  • Proactively engage customers and introduce skin and scalp analysis services
  • Support customer registration and identify individual skin/scalp concerns
  • Perform skin and scalp analysis using diagnostic equipment, guiding customers through the process
  • Deliver personalised consultation results and recommend suitable skincare and haircare solutions
  • Provide excellent customer service and respond confidently to enquiries using FAQs and product knowledge
  • Guide customers through product usage and purchasing decisions

2. Equipment Hygiene & Maintenance

  • Sanitize diagnostic equipment after each use in accordance with hygiene protocols
  • Ensure proper storage and basic upkeep of equipment to maintain optimal working condition

3. Merchandising & Store Operations 

  • Support daily store operations including stocking, replenishment, pricing, and visual merchandising
  • Maintain attractive product displays and ensure shelves are well organised
  • Assist with inventory handling and general store upkeep

Requirements & Qualifications

Education

  • Minimum GCE ‘O’ Level or Diploma in Retail, Business Management, or a related field
  • 2 years of retail or customer-facing experience
  • Strong customer service and interpersonal skills
  • Confident in recommending products and guiding purchasing decisions
  • Passion for skincare, scalp/haircare, and customer wellness
  • Comfortable operating diagnostic devices (training will be provided)
  • Detail-oriented with strong awareness of hygiene standards, protocols, and data compliance
  • Able to multitask and perform well in a fast-paced retail environment
  • Good problem-solving and decision-making abilities
  • Willing to work retail hours, including weekends and public holidays

How to Apply: Interested applicants, please click on the “Apply Now” to submit your updated resume.

Please note: Due to the anticipated high volume of applications, only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. All information provided will be treated with strict confidentiality and used solely for recruitment purposes.

Cheah Wei Ee

Team Lead - Contracting

EA Personnel No: R23114782

Peoplebank Singapore Pte Ltd | EA Licence No: 08C5248

PEOPLEBANK SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.


Peoplebank is Asia Pacific's leading talent solutions provider with a network of offices in Singapore, Hong Kong and Australia. Peoplebank provides one-stop recruitment and staffing solution services across multiple industry sectors covering contract and permanent hires, and payroll services. With a dedicated team of specialist consultants, we deliver several innovative candidate sourcing strategies, retention strategies, and operating best practices to provide excellence in our service levels for both our clients and candidates.
